metadata.description: Crypto research and trading-desk infrastructure for AI agents

plugins.name: stingray
plugins.description: Crypto research and trading-desk infrastructure for your agent: composable alerts (price + news + technicals), backtests against historical data, and a knowledge graph spanning spot, perp DEXs (Hyperliquid, Drift, Lighter), and prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi). Built for quants, discretionary traders, and research desks. Token-scoped, opt-in, Apache-2.0.
